summary: Rule-based review found 2 flag(s) and 4 documentation gap(s) for clinician review.

flags.message: Concurrent opioid and benzodiazepine exposure detected.
flags.explanation: An active benzodiazepine appears in the medication list while an opioid is being prescribed, which may increase sedation and overdose risk.

flags.message: PDMP review may have occurred but was not documented.
flags.explanation: The monitoring summary indicates PDMP review, but the encounter note does not clearly document it.

suggestedLanguage: Reviewed PDMP today; document any recent controlled-substance fills, care-coordination concerns, and rationale before finalizing.
Treatment goal is short-term improvement in pain control and daily functioning.
Patient will follow up for reassessment if symptoms worsen or fail to improve.
Discussed medication risks, sedation precautions, and when to seek further evaluation.
